subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 748124309/240915846 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida Tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 748124309/240915846 at 20:18:24.93 UT
on 15 September 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
